SUNQIAN_UNIVERSE_POWER_BURNING_POWER.des: Burning creatures lose HP at the start of their turn. Each turn, Burning has a {ClearChance}% chance to be cleared. If not cleared, this chance increases by 25%.
SUNQIAN_UNIVERSE_POWER_BURNING_POWER.sma: At the start of {OnPlayer:your turn, lose|its turn, loses} [blue]{Amount}[/blue] HP, then [gold]Burning[/gold] has a {ClearChance}% chance to be cleared. If not cleared, this chance increases by 25%.
